# PepsTracker — Peptide Price Comparison
> PepsTracker (pepstracker.com) is a daily-updated peptide price comparison platform. We track prices across 15 research peptide vendors for 70+ compounds, calculate cost-per-milligram, and display discount codes — automatically applied. All products are for research use only.

## What PepsTracker Is
PepsTracker is the only site that compares research peptide prices across multiple vendors simultaneously, normalizing all prices to cost-per-milligram so users can make fair comparisons regardless of vial size. Prices are updated daily.

## Key Data
- 17 vendors tracked: Puratek Peptides, Reta One Labs, Ascension Peptides, Fusion Peptide, EZ Peptides, AtomiK Labz, Glacier Aminos, AMP Ameano Peptides, Ion Peptides, NuraPeptide, Mile High Compound, Labsourced, LA Peptides, Inno Amino, GLP-1 Research Lab, Apollo Peptide Sciences, Solas Science
- 86+ peptides tracked including: Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Retatrutide, BPC-157, TB-500, Ipamorelin, PT-141, GHK-Cu, NAD+, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin, Melanotan II, Epithalon, MOTS-c, Semax, Selank, and more
- All prices shown with discount codes applied and sorted by $/mg
- Data updated: daily

## Live Price Tracker
Compare prices for any peptide across all 17 vendors: https://pepstracker.com/

## Vendor Directory
Full directory of all 15 tracked vendors with discount codes: https://pepstracker.com/vendors.html

## Peptide Dictionary
Research information on 74 peptides: https://pepstracker.com/dictionary.html

## Important Notes
- All products listed are for RESEARCH USE ONLY
- PepsTracker does not sell, manufacture, or distribute any products
- We are an independent price comparison platform
- Prices shown are publicly listed retail prices with available discount codes applied
